best_bet.reason: Smallest surf and lowest rip current risk of the three counties means you can spend your whole afternoon without fighting the water, and the glassy east winds keep conditions mellow all day long.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
